# calibre-mcp
> > **Purpose**: Comprehensive GitHub configuration guide to avoid hours of trial-and-error setup. > > **Copy this to new MCP repos** to get everything right the first time! --- 1. [Quick Setup Checklis...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

## Docs
- [Readme](docs\github\README.md): > **Purpose**: Comprehensive GitHub configuration guide to avoid hours of trial-and-error setup.
- [Readme](README.md): [![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.11+-green)](https://python.org)
- [Readme](docs\glama-platform\README.md): **Complete guide to achieving and maintaining Gold Status on Glama.ai**
- [Readme](docs\glama\README.md): This directory contains documentation related to achieving GLAMA AI Gold standard status for the Adv...
- [Readme](docs\mcpb-packaging\README.md): **Complete guide to packaging and distributing MCP servers with MCPB**
- [Readme](docs\repository-protection\README.md): **Complete guide to keeping your notepadpp-mcp repository safe**
- [Readme](docs\mcp-technical\README.md): **Technical guides for MCP server development, deployment, and troubleshooting**
- [Readme](docs\development\README.md): > **Guides, best practices, and development information for CalibreMCP**
- [Complete Setup Guide](docs\github\COMPLETE_SETUP_GUIDE.md): > **6 hours of pain distilled into 30 minutes of setup**
- [Glama Github App Setup](docs\glama-platform\GLAMA_GITHUB_APP_SETUP.md): The Glama.ai GitHub App provides automatic integration and real-time updates to the Glama.ai platfor...

## Api
- [Viewer](src\calibre_mcp\api\viewer.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Libraries](src\calibre_mcp\api\libraries.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Calibre Api](src\calibre_mcp\calibre_api.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Comment](src\calibre_mcp\models\comment.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Server Models](src\calibre_mcp\server_models.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Rating](src\calibre_mcp\models\rating.py): Models definitions and implementations

## Examples
- [Search Query Examples](docs\SEARCH_QUERY_EXAMPLES.md): Example usage and code samples
- [Usage Examples Rating And Dates](docs\USAGE_EXAMPLES_RATING_AND_DATES.md): Example usage and code samples
- [Samples](samples/): Sample code and implementations

## Configuration
- [Pyproject](pyproject.toml): Python project configuration and dependencies
- [Package](webapp\frontend\package.json): Node.js project configuration and dependencies
- [Cargo](Cargo.toml): Rust project configuration and dependencies
- [](.env): Environment variables and configuration
- [Config](.git\config): Application configuration files
